/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk/lib -o libpeperoni.dylib -install_name @rpath/libpeperoni.dylib CMakeFiles/peperoni.dir/peperoni_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peperoni.dir/__/__/interfaces/qlcioplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peperoni.dir/peperoni.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peperoni.dir/peperonidevice.cpp.o -iframework /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/Cellar/libusb/1.0.27/lib/libusb-1.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
